sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89948" key="prosphlo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπηλόω</orth>, <sense id="n89948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">close with clay</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χύτραν</foreign>] <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">99</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
